channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: The US has 10 days — 80 replies — 320.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US has 10 days

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-03-06 02:46 UTC

OP

The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)

At first, markets brushed off the conflict as another 12 day war. However, realization is setting in that Iran is actually capable of deterring passage through the Hormuz strait by 90%.

The problem is that every day that goes on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day. As storage becomes full, producers are forced to shut in production, which takes 2 weeks to restart. Thankfully, most of the world is fine for 1-2 weeks without gulf oil. After that, problems begin.

Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW for the magnitude of production shutdown.

What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.

How to end it? Trump has fallen for a Trump. There is no way to clear irans fast mountain ranges littered with AD and missile silos, thus tankers will keep getting shot in the Hormuz strait. The only way is to put troops on the ground.

Don’t really care if you think I’m a permabear or a doomer, I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in. They don’t understand that this is an existential war for Iran, it’s not some “geopolitical dip”.

Pic is Asian jet fuel prices

Early replies (first 3)

61938343
>>61938341
Slurp XOP? Wut do

61938344
So should I sell my TLT?

61938345
>>61938341
>I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in
Trump spent all of last year insider trading and TACOing so he's not trustworthy anymore

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938664
>>61938341
Based analysis. Credit markets are breaking, global central bank credit is rolling over, Hindenburg omens stacking, net savings as a % of gross national income going negative for the first time since 1929, bull steepening while the 2 year is mirroring behavioral crisis onset, 10 sigma VaR daily moves between asset class split plays on momentum moving between Korean stocks and bitcoin, bank heads messaging 2008 part deux and warning of a cyber attack from Iran, etc. Markets were going to crash anyways before anyone even mentioned Iran, this is just the narrative, just like repo blowing up in September 2019 and then March 2020 (covid) and 2001 (9/11). Oil priced in yen triggering unwind in global carry leverage will be a catalyst and spark for the rest. Look out below and buy when we're there. It's about to happen again.

61938724
>>61938664
In english Doc

61938734
>>61938341
what does this mean for my physical gold?

61938742
>>61938402
The ship crew are civilians not military

61938770
>>61938578
or what anon.
this is was the goal all along.
to create political system where Israel controls the entire middle east and doesn't face any oppression.
that's the only way Israel could continue have economic growth without relaying on foreign aid or selling military weapons to other countries

61939905
WTI about to break 80, markets will start to realize the implications of this

Also Iran is hitting gulf oil infrastructure hard this morning, after everybody thought their daily reduction in missiles meant they were on the verge of defeat

61939916
>>61939905
Trump's a fucking idiot and I'm tired of pretending otherwise

61939946
>>61938341
ai slop. fuck off

61939954
>>61938406
>>Trump occupies Iran - 10 years of insurgency
Iranians will never do an insurgency and the people who think they're like afghanistan fundamentally don't understand iranians.

61939974
>>61939954
I remember morons saying Iraqis were soft handed state coddled urbanites. morons (Republicans) never learn.

61939987
>>61939954
they're worse, same geography but more numerous and more prideful

61940017
>>61938578
Round up all remaining Palestinians and load them on barges by force and report them to the Congo or sudan or some other failed state. I'm sure they'd absolutely love to recapture the Sinai too but I doubt then ever go that far

61940028
>>61939974
I don't remember anyone ever saying that, maybe you're making things up because you're retarded.

>>61939987
Iranians are soft handed urbanites. And if they're not, 50 million iranians will end up in germany. Suck my dick, europoor.

61940029
>>61939905
So when do we get CBDCs Digital ID Social Credit Noahide Laws and One-World government HQ'd in Israel?

61940093
>>61940029
2030 obviously

61940107
oh no my oil stocks will moon what will i do now oh no

61940113
>>61939905
As someone balls deep in euro petrolium:
Oh no!

61940124
>>61938341

61940215
>>61940124
advanced money doctor

61940234
>>61938370
OP has been warned, he must evacuate his balls ASAP

61940472
>>61938341
This special combat operation will be over in 2 weeks, just like Ukraine

61940500
>>61939974
>only Republicans voted for war
Remember the reaction from Democrats when Trump pulled troops out of Syria?

61940570
>>61938402

A "launcher" can be made from about 3 scaffolding poles and a bungee cord. Iran has or had 80,000 drones. Trump dun goofed here when Israel tricked him into this.

61941344
>>61938341
How is Lutnick making money off this?

61941358
>>61938399
We'll explode the nuklear just like in the bibble.

61941381
>>61941358
>Middle Eastern Christians
I don't get why people bring up a nearly non-existent group. 99% of them convered to Islam either by choice or by force over the last 1,400 years.

61941414
>>61938341
So in two weeks?

61941712
>>61941381
>over the last 25 years*
Ftfy

61942683
>>61938601
Ships have been transiting the strait by the simple expedient of turning off their transponders.

61942707
I don't mind if Israel and the US want to be retarded in their own little sandboxes, but why do they have to drag the rest of the world into it

item.title: >biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to… — 28 replies — 97.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to…

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-03-06 02:32 UTC

OP

>biggest oil shock since 1973
>literally the worst case economic scenario
>he STILL hasn't sold
Some people just want to lose money.

Early replies (first 3)

61942069
Iran will open the strait by the end of the week retard
they don't want to anger china and Europe

61942088
last time I checked bitcoin is mostly mined with clean coal and waterfall generators so tell me why it matters

61942092
May panic sell tomorrow. Already got fucked holding over one weekend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61942094
>>61942069
>just one more weekend bro

61942100
>>61942092
Should I buy in the next days after the dip?

61942108
>>61942065
But my folio is built exactly for this scenario, bobs

61942111
>>61942069

Chinese and Russian tankers are allowed to transit

61942112
>>61942069
They're already letting Chinese/Russian ships through. They're only blocking NATO ships
>don't want to anger Europe
A sentence only a European could conjure up lmao

61942120
>>61942069
>Iran will open the strait by the end of the week retard
Why would they? That's their biggest chip in this casino
>they don't want to anger china
Which already stockpiled lots of oil from Russia through india, aims to support Iran in the war and doesn't want the US to dictate its oil import prices
>and Europe
Sadly we're irrelevant to the world. If we didn't deindustrialize ourselves through our 20 something sanctions against Russia we might still have some say but so far all we do is suffer and not support Iran even if paid us to take the oil.

61942121
>>61942112
The EU is the second largest economy in the world retard

61942126
>>61942121
And why would Iran give a fuck about that

61942131
>>61942065
>The supply decreasing will make the price crash!!!
....What?

61942136
>>61942131
>Supply decreases
>Buyers will lose economic power as they required the good in order to have economic growth
>Demand reduces

61942145
>>61942065
The US is not dependent on middle east oil any more like in 1973

61942178
>>61942136
>Picre
It's what happened to the price of oil in 1973.
You're acting like no one has oil reserves and that suddenly one strait being closed means everyone has zero oil. It's dumb as shit. The US has like 10+ years of oil on reserve. Britain has 5 years on reserve, etc.

Not only that, but if the good is REQUIRED to have economic growth, that is demand. Doofus ass. You're just describing a massive bull market for oil because the supply is reducing AND the ability to acquire it is getting harder. Which means people will pay more for it because they NEED it to keep everything moving.
DOOFUS.
ASS.

61942242
>>61942178
You're acting like the war is over in a week

61942281
>>61942242
The war could go on for 9999 years. Makes not much of a difference.
Iran mostly exports to CHAYNA, so who gives a shit?
The only issue is that there's shipping vessels caught in the hormuz strait.

Explain how this would do anything other than make the price of oil go up?
pro tip:
it can't. The price can only go up because it's harder to ship, the supply is decreasing and the demand is increasing.

61942291
>>61942120
>aims to support Iran in the war

Bro it's a bit late to "support iran in the war" sorry you missed your chance

The war began days ago it's almost over there's nobody left to lead Iran and no air defenses it's just a matter to clean up

61942386
>>61942281
>Makes not much of a difference.
I'd say 20% of all oil trade is significant
>>61942281
>Iran mostly exports to CHAYNA
>>they don't want to anger china
>Which already stockpiled lots of oil from Russia through india, aims to support Iran in the war and doesn't want the US to dictate its oil import prices

>The only issue is that there's shipping vessels caught in the hormuz strait.
And that the biggest exporters got lots of their refineries destroyed and currently don't feel safe continuing their operations
>Explain how this would do anything other than make the price of oil go up?
>>61942136
>the demand is increasing.
No

>>61942291
>Bro it's a bit late to "support iran in the war" sorry you missed your chance
Because of what exactly? Khamanei is gone and still Iran can operate. The US doesn't even know what its goal is besides making israel happy. Why are zogs so eager to trust sources from active war parties and its vassals?

61942457
>>61942131
>the price of something essential to the economy skyrocketing isn't a big deal
Fucking retard. The last time this happened we went through double digit inflation and stagflation.

61942465
>>61942457
Both are great for bitcoin

61942474
>>61942465
Extremely midwit post. High inflation=higher rates=number go down. You didn't actually fall for the "hedge against inflation" memes, did you?

61942558
>>61942386
>I'd say 20% of all oil trade is significant
Oh no! CHAYNA, the biggest importer through the Hormuz strait, will have its oil supply cut! THINK OF THE POOR CHAYNA MAN!
>And that the biggest exporters got lots of their refineries destroyed
Explain to me how this makes the price of oil go down...? Reducing the supply of oil increases the price, since the demand will remain the same or increase.
If there's actual prolonged war, the price will increase because war demands lots of oil.

The bearish outcome for oil would be the war stopping and everyone being happy and best friends with flowers and rainbows and hugs.
>>the demand is increasing.
>No
Yes. The demand won't decrease. It's not like people suddenly need less oil. The demand will remain the same (or increase) and the supply will decrease.
If there's 10 houses for sale and 10 people want houses, all is good.
If one of those houses blows up and now there's 9 houses and 10 people who want houses, the demand just increased because the supply is less than the demand.
It's very simple economics.

61942570
>>61942065
Au contraire, I am buying. Buying big. And will continue to do so.

61942590
>>61942386
Imagine defending the Ayatollah lol. Even Iranians hate their government.

61942628
Have fun trading in and out of crises while I just hold and buy more assets. You’re not smart. You’re going to sell, then buy in at a higher price.

61942664
>>61942590
>t. israeli propaganda victim

61942676
>>61942664
lol, I’m sure you have it all figured out.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 12 replies — 31.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-06 02:27 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938470
Girls?

61938839
>>61938470
hy

61938845
10,000 at 6.50$
i dont sell.
i hope and believe in 37-74$ in 2years

61939112
>>61932834
>>61933757
>>61936705


The main DOT reporting in

I hope you are buying

61942565
https://polkadothalving.com/ 8 more days

61942574
So do I buy before or after?
t. Retard

61942641
>>61942574
What do you think?

61942662
>>61942641
I don't think, I'm a retard

61942667
>>61942662
Well... that's an unsolvable problem, isn't it? Maybe cognitively reframe from being a retard into being inexperienced? Also, ask yourself "What does me saying I'm a retard protect me from?", have you ever thought about that labeling yourself as "stupid" is actually in order to protect yourself from failure?

item.title: It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war — 15 replies — 22.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-03-06 02:10 UTC

OP

And that's a nothingburger

Early replies (first 3)

61942258
????? It means we bomb the shit out of them wdym

61942268
>>61942181
I hate being American over the last decade so much, all we do is lose and embarrass ourselves... how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources? Meanwhile China will do nothing and win again and I will gave to endure all of 4chan laughing at us... I want to support China but I can't into Chinese women. Europe needs to become a superpower and dethrone China and America so I can cheer them on without reservations.

61942402
>>61942268
>how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources?
Bombing a mountain just creates a field

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61942407
>>61942268
Youre a spineless cuck thats bought literal chinese propaganda on an anonymous imageboard. Congratulations

61942434
>>61942402
We spend way too much money for them to have such shit aim.
>>61942407
>spineless
True
>cuck
False
>bought literal chinese propaganda on an anonymous imageboard
I think only >>>/g/ has active Chinese shills, but they have reached other boards somewhat. In any case I think the mainstream media has far more US propaganda than 4chan has Chinese propaganda, and a lot if what you see here about China is more true than the mainstream cares to admit. Which suits China just fine I'm sure.

61942454
>>61942434
>We spend way too much money for them to have such shit aim.
Well what more do they want to destroy? They could kill every representative iran has, then they'd need to kill the head of every local tribe and then they might have a chance for there to be no government in Iran. I'm the Iranians will just accept some jew or mutt as their new leader after being obliterated by them.

61942466
>>61942454
Why not just not go to war then?

61942478
>>61942466
The problems is that the US simply doesn't know what it wants. They killed the leader, they rejects diplomatic offers which eliminated the possibility of iran creating a nuclear arsenal. So what exactly do they want? The opening of the strait of hormuz? The complete capitulation? The US simply doesn't have any demands. Israel just wants destruction of the middle east to achieve greater israel (hence the attacks on Lebanon).

61942488
>>61942478
So we don't even have a clear goal? That's worse than I thought.

61942505
>>61942488
If we do, it's not public. I can't find one to the best of my abilities and the current military structure doesn't indicate a specific goal. I don't even know why Israel is involved in this considering greater israel doesn't include Iranian territories. Maybe Iran financed the hezbollah (I'm unsure of the veracity of that claim) but other than that I don't see any reason for israel attacking Iran except for current political differences.

61942513
>>61942488
>So we don't even have a clear goal? That's worse than I thought.
This comment, even from a /biz/tard outlines how little the average American understands about their own country and how deep the fiat money scam runs. They don't even realize that the USA is effectively the long arm of Pax Judaica. USA effectively started dying on on November 22, 1963 and it was sealed August 15, 1971, by suspending the convertibility of the U.S. dollar into gold.

61942528
>>61942513
Yes anon I know we are supporting Israel, that was my point.

61942535
>>61942488
The goal is to cause the apocalypse. The evangelical death cult has firmly had their claws in politics for years and I have no idea why people have never acknowledged this as a huge problem.

61942572
>>61942505
>I don't see any reason for israel attacking Iran except for current political differences.
Iran showed weakness, Israel struck them opportunistically.

61942633
>>61942268
have you entertained the possibility that the goal of these wars is not to win? that they are a tool to funnel public money into private pockets, indebting taxpayers against their will?

imagine if your grandchildren's grandchildren spent their lives paying down the interest from infinite war debts on israel's behalf, for wars that preceded their own births. that would be crazy haha

item.title: What happens when the globalist cabal uses social media to mass manipulate people into believing that BTC has no value? — 27 replies — 15.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
What happens when the globalist cabal uses social media to mass manipulate people into believing that BTC has no value?

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-03-06 01:05 UTC

OP

What happens when the globalist cabal uses social media to mass manipulate people into believing that BTC has no value?

Early replies (first 3)

61939609
They would prefer everyone use the easily traceable public ledger

61939633
>>61939603
>here's why BTC is going to 0
>here's why BTC is rat poisons squared
>BTC has no future and no use
>BTC has crashed and died, never coming back
They already do this. BTC is unkillable.
>BTC is kill
>no

61939634
>>61939603
The only thing that actually holds value is assets

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61939655
>>61939633
Why do you think it holds its value? My theory is that it's traded by aspergers who are immune to propaganda.

61939694
>>61939655
maybe to some extent, and there's nothing wrong with that
but its objectively a currency, one it's the only one that is fully decentralized, not being issued by or affiliated with any nation
it's the Linux of currencies

61939714
>>61939694
>its the Linux of currency

Just market sold all

61939794
>>61939655

For the exact same reason that gold holds value.

61939800
>>61939603
They right tho. Monero is the real coin

61939823
>>61939794
Gold is shiny and conducts electricity. BTC is literally a math equation that everyone agrees to use.

61939828
>>61939800

Monero will never be important.

61939854
>>61939794
valued for different reasons. this eternal biz seething debate is fucking retarded.

61939862
>>61939823

That doesn't explain anything.

61939880
>>61939854

No, they're not, actually. You really don't understand what you're talking about.

61939988
>>61939880

61940056
>>61939988

None of that explains why gold can be used to buy things. You assume that gold has value, but you don't know why. You've just always known that gold was valuable and never questioned it. You think that it's obvious. That's why you can't explain what makes it valuable or understand Bitcoin.

61940063
>>61939655
>the first stateless, trustless, frictionless decentralized currency
>how does it retain value?
Do you remember what moving money around before 2010 was like? Do you know how to wire xfer cash? Or have you ever made a cashiers check? Btc solved so many problems /biz/ and its micro-attention-span can't remember them anymore.
And the only genuine improvements to the btc protocol are found in xmr (with minor kudos to the other actually useful 'dinosaur' pow coins like ltc and doge that really just do the same thing)

61940087
>>61940056
>go tot he supermarket
>pay with 2 grams of gold
>accidently overpay by 59%
>fuck should've brought my half gram stack and some dust with me
>cashier goes to check if my gold is real
>every supermarket now needs 15 XRF analyzers
>not working today
>FUCK
>try to plead with him that the gold is real
>"IT HAS HECKIN CONDUCTIVE PROPERTIES"
>go deposit my gold dust into the bank like a good little goy
>Silverstein and Goldberg give me some promissory notes that are more easily divisible and fungible
>go to redeem my gold again 2 weeks later
>"Sorry goy, no gold redemptions this week. Also no more gold standard. We got rid of it lol"

61940096
>>61939823
BTC consumes electricity. Therefore, in a Keynesian sense, it is the perfect currency.

61940097
>>61939854
Is it tho ? Maxipads can't produce a non retarded argument. It is the same word salad that reeks of buy my bag desperation.

61940116
>>61940087

This is the problem that gold backed paper currency was meant to solve, none of this has anything to do with this conversation.

61940128
>>61939862
I'm pointing out how they don't hold their value for the same reasons, unless you're arguing that their both finite by definition l.

61940141
>>61940128
They're

61940149
>>61939603
They wont because bitcoin was literally created by the CIA and epstein and is used to fund child trafficking for elites.

61940150
>>61940128

You're wrong, though.

61940243
>>61940150
Nuh uh

61940245
>>61940116
>This is the problem that gold backed paper currency was meant to solve
gold backed paper currencies is just fiat with extra steps
>can I redeem my gold now
>uhhhh no goy, maybe next time
>actually nvm, no gold standard anymore

61942493
>>61939603
XRP Moons.

item.title: BAT bros I don't feel so good — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BAT bros I don't feel so good

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-03-06 02:40 UTC

OP

Eich scammed us I just hope we get back to 20c so I can dump this shit

Early replies (first 3)

61942645
Nigga you have to wait a full fucking year. It dumps consistently in December-January, so buy now and dump then.

The eich nigger will never ever employ actual use cases for this token because he and his team are scared little faggots.

The president and his entire family have publicly rug pulled multiple times and nothing has come of it negatively for them. Brendan eich is just a scared little faggot do nothing bitch boy.

61942696
>>61942058
>>61942645
I solded after I saw Eich namedropped in the epstein files.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 103 replies — 47.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 103 • Updated: 2026-03-06 00:39 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61926036
>>61899833
This thread smells like curry and shit.

Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.

61926122
>>61926036
>This thread smells like curry and shit.
So like most threads on /biz ?

>>61926036
>Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.
Sure buddy. The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!

61927655
>>61926122
>The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!
i'm genuinely considering dumping the rest of what i hold because of this post

61927803
>>61927655
Checked dump it

61927812
>>61899833
you will be lucky to get a 3x

61927816
>>61927812
Shib is ez 10x bear case 33x bull case

61927892
>>61927816
Never happening

61928058
>>61927892
>Shib will never go to a place it’s been before because it just won’t.
You sound tarded bro

61928094
>>61928058
It only went there because of insane hype and FOMO. It will never happen again unless Elon makes it the official currency of X or something

61928421
>>61927655
Please do fud chud. I like cheapies.
>>61927812
>>61928094
He didn't buy cheap before the etf and clarity act passed.
>NGMI!

61929970
> shib niggers in this thread ignoring the most obvious 1000-3000x token right in front of them

61931432
>>61929970
Its no use anon. These people like being poor. Sit back and hodl and wait for the fireworks.

61931717
Shib is positive returns for evm daily trade bots. Over 60% positive returns. So far they’re all trading at above 50% positive returns for bot trading. What ever happened to shiba sex? Still a general.

61931779
This thread makes me so happy, I thought all my Shibros had abandoned /biz/ forever...we're back in full force!

61932425
While retards in the chat slurping a shitcoin that’s already over 5 years olde, the smart money is dropping at least .2 eff on toad, just sitting back watching the drama unfold

61934414
50x

61934942
it begins...

61935122
Toads invade shib threads because its a zero volume zero interest and zero attention, its been a shit coin since early 2023. 1.9k holders that want to kys. Lol, lmao even.

61935440
>>61931779
SHIB blessing thread anon still here, i'm still here waiting for the time and it's going to happen

61936417
>>61935122
No u. Toad holders are going to make it.

61936442
my itch is on cheese, already bottomed only upwards from here

61936453
>>61936442
No fuck off with that jeet scam. Toad is not a jeet scam it's an Israeli/US government scam.

61937292
>>61899833
Luna never got a crack last time

61937454
>>61899833
I own $10,000 worth of Shib and that pile of shit isn't going anywhere.

61937662

item.title: Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. — 58 replies — 28.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted.

Open thread • Replies: 58 • Updated: 2026-03-06 00:49 UTC

OP

Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.

Instead Chainlink keeps the scam going for years and years, with new "partnerships" and "news" and "integrations", all while the token does nothing. They give just enough breadcrumbs to keep the baggies holding on desperately for a pump, and they probably keep buying even more LINK tokens as well ensuring they remain poor forever as they wait for a "mega moon" that never comes.

In that way it's actually a more brutal and evil scam, but still funny. It's crazy because all they had to do was buy Bitcoin... or gold, or the S&P 500, or literally anything else.

Early replies (first 3)

61931782
fuck all stinkies :}
hate em all hate em all
think they SUUUUCK xD

61931907
>>61931684
>At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.
Wait a minute. You're telling me I've DCA'd into a scam all these years?

61931931
thanks for keeping this a Chainlink board

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61933029
its funny seeing the same fudders unleashing their pent up vitriol day in day out fudding their own shitcoin after all these years, brain damaged cucks lmao. You retards were smug yourselves, wasted 2 bull markets in a row being all uppity and keeping le normies out xddd, should have bought some other shitcoins and not sat on your asses hahaha maybe then you wouldnt waste your life f5'ing this dead board to cry about link (the same token that makes up 90+% of your portfolio because you're a dumb poorfaggot who has 0 clue how to make money)

61933088
>>61932522
yes

61933115
>>61933029
Nice essay but adem won

61934197
>>61933088
checked, but if you say yes then you are auto included in that 10%

61934242

61934584
>>61932086
correct. the boyscouts tried to dish it out, but they sure as hell can't take it

all talk, no walk

their hubris was their downfall
>>61932295

look at how low energy you are bro. you have no material, you have no gains, you have no confidence

take that L like a man

61934590
>>61932558
>Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe.


i would pay to see one of you awkward losers try to hire a hitman in real life. if by some miracle you even managed to contact one of these groups, i imagine they'd look you over, make sure no one was around, and just take your money and then disappear

at which point you'd have no other option other than to to back to larping as a badass online

61935620
take the L, stinkbots

61936147
>>61934590
>well they'll never find my suicidal porn blog entries or notice my simping after niggerdick on x
>well they'll never find out that I'm a third worlder who dropped out of business school to join a mlm scam company that got busted
>well they'll never find out what I look like
>well they'll never message people I know
>well they'll just forget I sold my stack for wormhole and linksol and that I got irrevocably fucked as a result

You thought all of those things at one stage, now everyone including you knows how incredibly incredibly retarded you are... but dw I'm sure that
>well nothing will ACTUALLY happen when some mentally ill new millionaires target me for sport

Will totally hold and you'll be perfectly fine lil fella

61938160
>>61931684
Agreed. Endless "partnerships" and paid pilots ending up providing price feeds. The entire token has zero purpose outside inserting a fee and does nothing solution wise. It doesn't even make sense but the cult of followers just ignore this and never even argue against it and act like it is getting exposure to the core product success of the company. I seriously have no idea how they can be like this if they legitimately aren't paid shills.

61938725
money talks

61938733
I built my own oracle with AI lol. Theres a reason its the price that it is. not special.

61938776
>>61938160
This is good fud

61938896
>>61938776
It is just reality, which itself turns out to be pretty good fud when the fervor dies down.

61938901
>>61932086
This. They were ENDLESSLY smug. They acted indistinguishable from indians and their coin is indistinguishable from jewish rent seeking with no utility beyond pumping sirgay's pockets while he fuck you.

61938913
>>61934590
>He thinks it would happen irl

61938917
>>61932298
Cheap linkies again? Sign me up

61938935
Chainlink is unique among shitcoins though because it's more like a cult. I can remember a few years these people spamming up every forum I frequented including places that had nothing to do with crypto or finance. A deranged cackle of midwits who became giddy at every "partnership" and "on-chain utility" thinking they were so ahead of the market and that they were geniuses. That's why they are baggies, they are too emotionally invested and their ego cannot handle accepting that they were scammed. Most people who get rugged in a shitcoin scam at least know on some level that it's a pump and dump coin but that they were just too late to enter and too late to sell.

61938954
Cardano is worse
>tfw dropped $5000 on it back when it was $3 in 2021 like a retard
>it's currently $0.40
>been holding it patiently waiting to break even to get my money back

61939099
>>61932038
you do realize that if chainlink goes to zero people will be posting about it here for years, right?

61939107
>>61932327
>>61932513
>>61932516
>that link poster who is fully all-in dca no matter what also has millions available to buy a dip
personally I love stinks

61939365
>>61936147

>duuuuuuuude i sent someone a message on facebook 3 years ago
hahahhahaha

to put it another way, you got so mad about your online cult being disrespected, you went searching online for a random dude in the netherlands, and now you spend your days thinking about him jerking off

bahahahaha

i fucking BODIED you these last few years, and it's been very hard for you to come to grips with it

but you'll eventually take it in stride, because that's what you do

that's who you are. and who is that you ask....

THE Cuckolds of crypto

61939372
>>61938776

in other words

>h h hehh guys, i'm t t TOTALLY cool with this
>a all part of the p p plan

bahahhaha you aren't fooling anyone kid


you don't have to pretend here, it's anonymous
just be yourself buddy

61939406
Artemis please come back I need my hopium.

61940963
>>61939365
Yawn
No one is convinced. You can keep barking, subhuman - but it's just the barking of a bbc simp cuck who won't have any resources to hide with when the time comes. You're the property of biz which is why you're doxxed, and why you're stuck here every day trying to get people to sell because it's the only thing you can think of to do to try to increase your odds later. That's how fuckin dumb you are lmfao.

61941143
>>61940963
>Yawn

you've been yawning for years now. take a nap already kid

>No one is convinced
who exactly are you speaking for here. the chart looks pretty convinced (you're down 80)

>but it's just the barking of a bbc simp cuck who won't have any resources to hide with when the time comes.

bahahhahahhaahaha

dude you just aren't hard. how many times do i have to tell ya


>lmfao

it's not authentic to say that when you're in tears

61941730
>>61941143
Browns don't understand why white people know they are brown just by their typing. It's honestly incredibly easy to spot you. It's lame at this point. I just hope you hold Link and this is just a way to vent your frustration away. Truly sad to see

61941797
>>61932671
Yeah bro I was banking on it hitting $90 at least last year and now my life is fucked.
I'm surprising emotionally alright though but if I sat down and took the time to comprehend the opportunity cost I would want to rope immediately.

>I'm better off focusing on a high income career than waiting for this shit
This is how I'm coping too.

61942302
>>61931684
>scam
no actually
they make money and buy back the token
they have been doing 1.1 million USD buybacks every week: https://x.com/chainlink/status/2029618640916447458

61942449
5 reasons LINK will fail

1) Token necessity is unclear
Customers want reliable data/messaging, not volatility. If adoption grows, it can be structured as a service (fiat/stables, contracts, OTC), making LINK optional rather than required.

2) Partnerships ≠ production
Many “partnerships” are pilots, programs, or compatibility announcements with limited measurable throughput. The market can end up pricing logo density instead of fee density.

3) Value accrual may bypass holders
Even if usage exists, economics can flow mainly to node operators and negotiated counterparties, while token holders get narrative upside without proportional cash-flow linkage.

4) Staking doesn’t prove demand
Yield matters only if funded by sustainable fees. If rewards are modest or subsidy-dependent, staking is retention/marketing, not an economic flywheel.

5) Commoditization risk
Oracles/messaging can be competed by alternatives, specialized providers, rollup-native solutions, or “good enough” centralized feeds. If switching is feasible, pricing power compresses.

What would falsify this bear case: multi-quarter, auditable growth in fee revenue tied to on-chain usage; clear mechanics forcing LINK acquisition/holding; scaled CCIP/oracle volumes with transparent unit economics; staking materially funded by fees.

item.title: This wagie has escaped — 52 replies — 13.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
This wagie has escaped

Open thread • Replies: 52 • Updated: 2026-03-05 22:56 UTC

OP

I did it anons. I escaped the wagie cage, work offered me a redundancy thinking i would say no and ask to be redployed in another shitty role.
The HR roastie was visibly shaken. "But anon, the market is tough right now!" After 15 years i have paid off all debt and saved plus will be 200k after tax redundancy.

After selling my house, this will give me enough to retire in SEA. Fuck waging.

Early replies (first 3)

61933494
>>61933477
kek

61933581
>>61933477
The Light abandons no man

61933627
>>61933477
>retire in SEA
ehhhhhhhhhh

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61935716
>>61935647
Do they really let foreigners buy in those places?
Will they give me citizenship?
Are all those countries full of sociopathic emotionless corrupt people like Russians?

61935721
>>61933477
Congrats on the escape. I hope I can too but for now I’m happy some anon has freed themselves.

61935822
>>61933866
best advice in this thread
>>61933899
Check out a few different places around the world before you decide to commit to just one.
With over a million you can easily dump it into dividend/income focused ETFs and retire to a modest life pretty much anymore you want. SEA is selling yourself short.

61935846
>>61935716
>noooo people aren't smiling for no reason all the time, they're literally insane
You're not fit to live with slavs, stick to Latin America

61935869
>>61935647
lol dipshit, does all your knowledge of russia come from /pol/ and fox jews?
Every intelligent russian with money is fleeing that shithole and telling people in the west about how fucking horrible and utter shit it was, meanwhile you have turbo virgins who spend all their time crying on the internet and sucking trump's dick trying to convince you it's some white paradise.
I hope you migrate over there and get raped by an arab or central asian mongoloid.

61936723
You will love it... till you don't know what to do next. And then you'll start a bar (and usually fail like many farangs), find that you are out of money and you'll be worried what else to do
till you will be back to work.

61936931
>>61936723
There’s so many ass blasted cucks here. What do you think all the thirdies taking all the jobs do when they work in America? They send the money back home and then leave the country when they have enough to be rich and retire over there. Heaven forbid an American who actually worked for his money leaves

61936945
>>61933862
1mill is made it point for me at like lowest of standards I'd accept so yeah thats it enjoy

61937074
>>61936945
He’s not planning on living in America retard.

61937111
>>61933725
>>61933844
Thats 13 years worth of poverty wages anon. You're gonna have a bad time. Unless you plan to put it in a high yield divvy stock or savings acct and live off the interest.

61937117
>>61933862
Oh ok. Plus a mill I mean sure yeah, go nuts. Living off the interest not principal is still a good idea though. You can live like a kang... in America even in one of the poorer states, off that kind of scratch.

61937202
>>61933477

61937294
>>61937074
Yeah with 1mill im not affording america anhwhere not that theres anything to afford here since its all shit

61937302
>>61935688

61937315
>>61937302

61937321
>>61937202

61937357
>>61937315
Poland's pretty safe nowadays.

61937362
There's a bit of seething on here from the usual suspects, but thank you to the anons who support my mission live free of the zog

61937422
>>61933477
I admire your balls anon. I feel like living there would make you a target. Maybe get a guard dog.

61937534
>>61937362

61937556
>>61935869

> central asian mongoloid.
Don't move to Uzbekistan.

61937558
>>61933725
>>61933831

61937566
>>61933873
you better have low standards or really be open minded ,dont be an asshole to locals, good luck

61938048
>>61937294

61938066
>>61933477
>retire in SEA

Ya blew it

61940011
>>61933477
>retire in SEA
you live my dream
i wish you a endless stream of nice pussys

61941084

61941708
>>61933477

61942017
>>61933477

61942044

OP

I sold my crypto for gold and silver right before gold and silver dumped and crypto mooned

61935952

61935961

61936205

61936277
>>61935896

61939744

>not owning physical metals

61939901

61940058

61940073

61940081

61940100
>>61936277
Holy fuck, dont ever let someone you know operate on you. I think about Dr. Death, one of his oldest friends was a patient, he convinced him to go in for a routine shoulder surgery, quick in and out thing. Doctor botches it in the most cockamamie fucking way possible, all but decapitates the guy and now hes quadriplegic for life.

Nurse later came forward and said he said something like "Teach people not to fuck with me." during surgery. Apparently there was some old beef he still had with the guy, fucked him for life.

61940185
>>61936205

61940199
>>61940073

61940219
>>61935866
>>61935808

61940638
>>61940081

61942223
>>61935928
It's not a casino if we can just focus on one asset. I sold all my alts to buy BTC which I'm now staking on Babylon, and my portfolio has improved significantly since I did this because most of the alts that I was holding then are now dust

61942278
It takes every ounce of willpower to not sell my bitcoin and go into leveraged ETFs related to AI. But the universe punishes the impatient. Take this as a valuable lesson, anon.

61932668

61933327

61934323

61934675

61935386

61936756
uuup

61936937
>>61933327
Keep bumping the thread!
When 10 snail threads are up at the same time, the snail can't post a new thread anymore.
It has happened before and was absolutely hilarious to watch.

61938018
>>61936937

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-03-05 23:08 UTC

OP

Day 1653 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

61933206
>>61933100

61933306
>>61933100

61933408

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61934026
>>61933100
fake, fraud & fag

kys

61934046
>>61933100
does your snail women have to wear sheets ?

61934326
snailing

61934461
>>61933100

61934682
salty

61935149
buump

61935162
>>61933306

61935165
>>61933100

61935391
ayatollah snailola

61935537
snaily snail

61936241

61936765

61936943
>>61933100

Pic related is what you actually are.

61937137
>>61936943

61938019
up

61938023
Stop

61938297
day 3 of snailbumping every day until the 'log is nothing but snailposting

61938380
>>61938023
No, bump snail threads until the /biz/ catalog is nothing but snails.

61938461
ok

61938624
>>61938297
stop. the jannies have encountered this trolling before and have a lazy approach to it, date based auto-sages. But it kills long running threads that are quality. you + their lazys asses WILL kill the board.

61939084
>>61938624
kek sounds like it will only get the pmg trannies buttmad
lets do it

61939451
>>61938624
They do it for FREE. Let that sink in.

61939566
>>61938624
>But it kills long running threads that are quality

There are no quality threads on biz you retard.
There are only retarded spam threads like "500k is life changing money" or "OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO" cope threads.
So we might as well have fun with these spam snail threads.

61941094
more snails

61941500
SNAILS IS LOVE SNAIL IS LIFE

61942081
upp
